title: OptimNVC
description: OptimNVC adds optimisation and voice chat to Minecraft.
body: **_OptimNVC_** adds optimization and client side voice chat. **_OptimNVC_**'s main reason why it was created is due to my potato that I call a PC struggles running Minecraft. First I tried playing only servers, then I downloaded only Sodium, then I realised. The more optimisation mods, the bigger performance! So I added all optimisation mods I knew about. If you want more optimisation mods to this let me know, as I am happy to update it. All versions of 1.1.1 are broken. If you wish to have QoL mods also use [OptimNVC QoL](https://www.modrinth.com/modpack/optimnvc-qol)
